applicable_scenarios: Board-level ADC top and block-design scaffolding

artifacts.summary: Representative SPI ADC top-level wiring for SPI, BUSY, CNV, reset, and sample-valid plumbing.
Board-specific block-design entry that sets ADC parameters and sources the common SPI ADC BD fragment.
Reusable SPI ADC BD fragment with trigger generation, edge capture, SPI Engine hookup, and DMA routing.
Minimal project wrapper that adds top, constraints, and shared support files.
Representative SPI ADC pinout and IOSTANDARD constraints.
